# terrible_community_general_hwc_vpc_peering_connect (Data Source)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this data source against
- `local_vpc_id` (String) Specifies the ID of local VPC.
- `name` (String) Specifies the name of the VPC peering connection. The value can contain 1 to 64 characters.
- `peering_vpc` (String) Specifies information about the peering VPC.

### Optional

- `description` (String) The description of vpc peering connection.
- `state` (String) Whether the given object should exist in Huawei Cloud.
- `timeouts` (String) The timeouts for each operations.
